# AllOverIt.Logging

## Purpose
This package contains extension methods to provide additional logging functionality.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.Logging/AllOverIt.Logging.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0;net9.0;net8.0
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, GenericHost
- Depends on: AllOverIt

- class LogCallOptions
- class LoggerExtensions

- LogAllExceptions
- LogException

### Active namespaces

- AllOverIt.Logging.Extensions
